title: Franky Resists CP9
description: Spandam’s abuse of authority and his control over Robin and Franky make the World Government threat more personal.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Sanji, Franky, Nico Robin, Nami, Usopp. Spandam’s abuse of authority and his control over Robin and Franky make the World Government threat more personal.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Thank God, there's a few here.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: The guys earlier just had useless crap,

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Like masks, and costumes, and stuff.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm the hidden boss of water seven!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: He did save Going Merry at one point!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The City of Water. Water seven

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: inner garbage disposal area, the brick warehouse

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: It might not work anymore. NGaggaga!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Whoa!!!......!! There it is!!! It's cool!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: First off, it's not a good thing!

summary: Spandam’s abuse of authority and his control over Robin and Franky make the World Government threat more personal.
